params.name: fromDateTime
params.description: The start date and time for the calls filter in ISO-8601 format (e.g., 2021-01-01T00:00:00Z).

params.name: toDateTime
params.description: The end date and time for the calls filter in ISO-8601 format (e.g., 2021-12-31T23:59:59Z).

params.name: cursor
params.description: A cursor for pagination. Pass the cursor from the previous response to retrieve the next page of results.

params.name: workspaceId
params.description: Optional workspace identifier to filter calls by workspace.

items.docs: Retrieves a list of calls that took place during a specified date range. Results are paginated and can be filtered by workspace.
Adds a new call record to Gong. Either provide a downloadMediaUrl in the request body or use the returned callId in a follow-up request to /v2/calls/{id}/media to upload the media file.

params.name: id
params.description: Gong's unique numeric identifier for the call (up to 20 digits).

items.docs: Retrieves detailed information about a specific call identified by its unique numeric identifier.

Retrieves extensive call data including participants, topics, trackers, comments, scorecards, and other analytics. Supports filtering by date range, call IDs, or hosting users. Requires the scope api:calls:read:extensive.

info.name: Gong List calls manually associated with CRM

params.name: fromDateTime
params.description: Filter by the time the manual association was created, in ISO-8601 format.

params.name: cursor
params.description: A cursor for pagination. Pass the cursor from the previous response to retrieve the next page of results.

items.docs: Retrieves a list of calls that were manually associated with CRM objects by users. This endpoint is in beta phase. Results can be filtered by association time.
Retrieves the list of users who have access to specified calls and their access levels.
Grants specified users access to specified calls within the Gong platform.
Removes specified users' access to specified calls within the Gong platform.

params.name: id
params.description: The callId returned from the Add New Call request.

items.docs: Adds call media (audio or video recording) to a previously created call. Gong accepts recordings in WAV, MP3, MP4, MKV, and FLAC formats up to 1.5GB in size.
Retrieves transcript data for calls matching the specified filter criteria. Transcripts include speaker identification and timing information.
